english_query: why counting up good and bad results is harder than it sounds
ugf_response: First, we notice that when you try to add up the good things and the bad things you have to look at each thing that happens. Then we see that many of those things are not together but make each other change, so you cannot just count them one by one without thinking about the way they are together. This means you have to keep track of the chance that one thing will cause another good or bad thing, and that chance can be small or big. Next, we see that the way you count can be moved one way by the way you think about the good things, so you might count more of them than the bad ones even if they are the same. This makes you need a way to keep the count even and not let your own move change it. Then we note that the numbers you get can be big and the small ones can get lost, so you have to be careful not to miss a little bad thing or a little good thing. This also means you have to use a way to write down each count so you do not forget any. Finally, we see that all of these parts make the simple act of adding good and bad things a hard job that needs a lot of thought and care.

english_query: the problem of spending more just because you already spent a lot
ugf_response:
Imagine you go to a place to buy things. You start by buying one small thing. Then you buy a second thing. Now, you have spent some of your money. You look at how much money you have left. You think to yourself, I have already spent a lot of money. Because I have already spent this much, I feel like I must keep spending more. I feel like I should buy more things to make the money you already gave away seem good.

This is a bad way to think. To see why, we must look at the money you have left in your hand. That money is all that matters for the next choice you make. The money you already gave away is gone. You cannot get it back. It does not change how much your next choice will help you or how much it will hurt you.

Let us look at a way to think about this. Suppose you pay to go see a show. After you sit down, you see that the show is very bad. It makes you feel sad or angry. You might think, I should stay because I already paid for the way into the place. But if you stay, you are losing two things. First, you lose the money you paid. Second, you lose the time you are sitting there feeling bad. If you leave, you only lose the money. You save your time.

The wrong way of thinking happens when people think the money they spent in the past should change what they do now. They think they must keep going to make the first spend good. But the first spend is finished. It is a thing of the past. When you decide what to do next, you should only look at what you have now and what will happen next. You should not let the money that is already gone tell you how to act. If you do this, you will often spend even more money and even more time on things that do not make you happy.

english_query: how to tell if one thing follows from another
ugf_response: You did not give me the words you want me to look at. Please give me the words. Once you give me the words, I will tell you what the person says is true. I will also tell you what they think comes after those things. Last, I will tell you if the way they think is good or bad. I will use only the simple words you told me I can use. I will not use any marks to make the words look different. I will write in long pieces of writing that move like a story.

english_query: the difference between a strong reason and a weak reason
ugf_response:
Imagine you want to do something. You tell a friend why you want to do it. This reason is a way to show that your choice is good or right. Sometimes, one reason is very strong and makes people want to agree with you. Other times, a reason is not strong and does not make sense to anyone.

The hard question is how we know which reasons are strong and which ones are not strong. How can we tell if a reason is good enough to make a choice?

One way to look at this is to see if the reason rests on things that are true for everyone. A strong reason might be something that we can see and touch, or something that stays the same for all people. To show you what I mean, if you say you must eat because your body needs food to live, that is a strong reason. It is a thing that is true for all living things. People will see this as a good way to think.

Another way to look at this is to see if the reason is just a feeling. A reason that is not strong might be something that only one person feels and cannot be shown to others. If you say you must eat because the color of the food makes you feel happy, some people might say that is a reason that is not strong. It is not something that stays true for everyone. It is just a feeling in your head.

Some people might say a reason is strong if it helps many people. They might think that if a choice makes the most people happy, then the reason for that choice is very good. They look at the end of the story to see if it was good.

Other people might say a reason is strong only if it follows a set of ways that we all agreed to follow before. They do not care as much about the end of the story. They care about whether the way you got there was right from the start. They look at the way you think to see if it is the same as the ways we have always used.

In the end, we are always trying to find the best ways to tell if our thoughts are good or if they are bad. We want to know if we are making a good choice or if we are just following a feeling that has no weight.

english_query: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
ugf_response:
The first idea says that there are real times when putting all you have learned out there can cause trouble. It is true that when you tell everything, other people can use that stuff in ways that hurt you, make you feel not safe, or spread the word to people who might not need it. It is also true that some things you have learned can cause worry or fear if they are heard by those who are not ready for them. In short, the idea that sharing all you have learned is not always the best move fits with what we see most days.

The second idea takes the first idea and says that because of those possible hurts, you should keep some things to yourself. It says that the right move is to think about who will hear, why they will hear, and what they might do with the word before you speak. It also says that keeping back some of the things you have learned can keep you safe, keep others from hurt, and keep the even feel in a group. The thought that you need to choose what to share, instead of always sharing everything, follows the first idea.

The third part looks at whether the thinking behind the second idea is good. The thinking is good when it makes you stop and ask if the other person needs the word, if the word could cause hurt, or if the word could be used in a bad way. In those cases, the care shown is a good way to keep safe and keep trust. The thinking can be less good when it turns into a way of keeping too much inside that happens a lot, because that can stop learning, stop help, and make people feel left out. So the best path is a middle way: think about the chance of hurt, think about the chance of help, and then decide if you should speak all, some, or none of what you have learned. This even way keeps the good parts of sharing while lowering the chance of the bad parts.

english_query: how some ideas stop you from thinking further
ugf_response:
Sometimes, a person has a way of thinking that stays the same. This way of thinking is like a box. When you are inside the box, you can only see what is inside the box. You might think you are seeing the whole world, but you are only seeing a small part of it. This is a problem because it stops you from finding new things or new ways to be right. This can make it so you cannot see things that are right in front of you.

The hard question is this: how can a person know when their own way of thinking is making it so they cannot see what is true? How can we see the walls of the box when we are inside it?

First, some people might say that we can find the truth by looking at what is happening around us. They say that if our way of thinking is wrong, the things we see in the world will not be the same as what we think. If we think the sun goes around the earth, but we see the sun move in a different way, then we know our thought was wrong. For these people, the world tells us when we are wrong.

Second, other people might say that we can only find the truth by talking to others. They think that if one person is in a box, they cannot see the walls. But if many people come together, they can see each other. If one person thinks one thing and another person thinks something else, they can look at the space between those two thoughts. By looking at what they both do not see, they might find the truth.

Third, still other people might say that we must look deep inside our own minds. They think we must watch how our own minds work. They say we must ask our own minds why we think a certain way. They think that if we are very careful and very slow, we can see the ways our minds try to stay safe and stay in the box. They believe that being very true to what is inside you is the only way to break the box.

english_query: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
ugf_response:
Person number one: What makes a person feel good in a way that stays for a long time? I do not mean the quick feeling of eating something sweet or getting a new thing. I mean the deep feeling that stays in your heart even when things are hard.

Person number two: That is a big thing to talk about. Most people think that getting things or having fun for a short time is what makes them feel good. But that feeling goes away very fast. To feel good in a deep way, you must have things that do not go away when the sun goes down.

Person number one: What are those things? Is it having a lot of money?

Person number two: No, money is not it. Money can buy things, but it cannot buy the feeling in your soul. One thing that helps is being part of something bigger than yourself. This could be helping other people, or being part of a group that works for a good reason. When you do things that help the world or help other people, you feel a deep kind of good that stays with you.

Person number one: So, it is about helping others? Is there anything else?

Person number two: Yes. Another thing is to be the person you are meant to be. This means you know who you are and you live in a way that is the same as what you believe is right. When the things you do and your heart are the same, you feel a state where your mind is not loud or full of bad feelings, and that is very strong.

Person number one: Does this mean we must always do the right thing to be happy?

Person number two: It is not about being perfect. It is about trying to live in a way that makes sense to your heart. When you spend your time on things that matter, like love, and work, and helping, you find a way to be happy that does not go away when a small thing goes wrong.

english_query: the idea that the right thing to do is what leads to the most good
ugf_response:
Many people wonder what makes a thing good or bad to do. Some people think that certain things are always bad, like telling a lie, no matter what happens. Other people think that we should look at what happens after we do something to decide if it was a good thing.

There is a way of thinking about this where we try to make the most good for as many people as possible. To understand this, first, we must think about what good is. We can think of good as things like being happy, being well in the body, or not being in pain. We can think of bad as things like being sad, being sick, or being in pain.

When we have to make a choice, we look at all the things we could do. For each thing we could do, we try to see how much good it will bring and how much bad it will bring. We look at all the people who will be touched by what we do. We count the good and we count the bad.

The idea says that the best thing to do is the one that has the most good left over after we take away the bad. If one choice brings a little bit of good to ten people, and another choice brings a lot of good to only one person, we must look at the whole thing when we put them all together. We want the whole thing of being happy and being well in the body in the world to be as big as it can be.

This way of thinking means that we do not just look at our own feeling of being happy. We look at everyone. We try to act in a way that makes the whole world a better place by adding as much good as we can. We do not look at what we should do because of old ways of thinking. Instead, we look at what will actually happen and try to make the best thing that comes from it for the most people.

english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response:
Imagine a time when two people are talking. One person says something. Later, the other person tells a different story about what was said. The words the second person uses are not the same as the words the first person used. This makes it hard to know what the true thing was.

The hard question is how we can know when someone is changing what was said. We want to know if the person is telling the truth or if they are making up a new story to make themselves look good or to make the other person look bad.

Some people might say that we can look at the person who is talking. They might look at the face and the eyes of the person. They think that if a person is lying, their face will show it. They think that a person who tells the truth will look calm and not move much.

Other people might say that we should look at what other people saw. If many people were there and they all heard the same thing, then we can be more sure of what was said. They think that if many people say the same thing, it is good to think that it is the true thing.

Some people might also look at how the story changes over time. If a person tells the same story many times, it might be true. But if the story changes every time they tell it, it might mean they are making it up as they go. They think that a story that stays the same has a good chance of being what really happened.

There is also the idea that we must look at why a person would want to change the words. If changing the words helps them get what they want or keeps them out of trouble, they might do it. People who think this way believe that we must look at the reason behind the words to find the truth.

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response: First, you let the person talk and you try to hear every word they say. When they speak, pay close attention to the way they say things, the tone of their voice, and the pauses they take. Those small signs can tell you that something more is being kept back. Second, after you have listened, you ask nice questions. Use words like “why”, “how”, “what happened next”, and “who else was there”. These questions help the person think about parts of their story that may not have been spoken at first. When you ask, do not push too hard; instead, let the person feel safe enough to share more. Third, watch what the person does as they speak. Notice if their eyes look away, if they touch their face, or if they move their weight. These small things they do often point to parts of the story that are still hidden. When you see a sign like that, you can say something like “I see you seem not calm about that part, would you like to talk about it?” This lets the person know you have noticed and that you are ready to hear more. Next, look at the facts that are already known. Write down the things that have been said and the things that have been seen. Then ask yourself what is not there. If a person says they were at a place at a certain time, check if there is any other person or any other thing that could have been there at the same time. If a part of the story does not fit the very same fact you already have, that not the same part is a sign that something is still hidden. After that, talk to other people who know the same person. Ask them in a kind way what they saw or heard. Different people may have seen different pieces of the same story. When you bring those pieces together, the hidden parts become clearer. Then, think about the whole picture made of pieces. Put the spoken words, the small signs, the facts, and the pieces from the people together like a picture made of pieces. See where there are empty parts. Those empty parts are the places where the hidden parts may still be. Try to fill each empty part by asking another nice question or by looking for another sign. Finally, be calm and keep a tone that does not change fast. Sometimes hidden parts do not come out right away. Giving the person time and showing that you are not thinking about right or wrong helps them feel safe enough to let those parts rise. In the end, the way to find the hidden parts of the story of a person is to listen well, ask nice questions, watch small signs, check the known facts, talk to other people, and put all the pieces together while staying calm and not changing fast. By doing this you give the person a chance to share the whole story, not just the parts that are easy to say.

english_query: when we have good reason to think a thing will or will not happen
ugf_response:
The first idea is that we have reasons to believe a thing will or will not happen. This means we look at what we know now to guess what will happen later. The person says that these reasons are good. This is the part that we take as true for this talk. We accept that there are ways to look at the world that give us a way to see what is coming.

The second idea is what follows from having these good reasons. If we have these reasons, then we should act in a certain way. We should use what we know to make choices. If we know a thing has a big chance to happen, we should prepare for it. If we know a thing has a small chance to happen, we can stop waiting for it. The person thinks that having these reasons gives us a way to decide how to live and what to do.

The third idea is whether the way of thinking is good. To know if this is good, we must look at how we find these reasons. If the reasons are made from things that are not true, then the whole way of thinking is bad. If the way we find the reasons is wrong, then our guess about the future will be wrong too. To make the thinking good, we must make sure our ways of looking at the world are right and that we do not let our own wrong thoughts get in the way of what is real.

english_query: how two things happening together does not mean one causes the other
ugf_response:
Imagine two things that happen at the same time. Let us say that every time the sun comes up, a man in a small house opens his window. If we see the sun come up and then see the man open his window, we might think that the sun makes the man open his window. We might think that the sun is the thing that makes the window open. This is a way that our minds work. We see two things together and we want to say that the first thing made the second thing happen.

But this is not always the truth. There is a hard question we must ask. Does the first thing really make the second thing happen, or are they just happening together for another reason?

One way to look at this is to think about a third thing. Let us say that it is morning. The morning makes the sun come up, and the morning also makes the man wake up and open his window. In this way, the sun and the window are happening together, but the sun did not make the window open. The morning made both things happen. The two things are together, but one did not make the other.

Other people might say that it is just a chance that they happen together. They might say that if you watch for a long time, you will see many things that happen at the same time that have no way of being joined at all. It is just how the world is.

We must be very careful when we see two things together. We cannot say that one makes the other happen just because they are seen at the same time. We must look for the thing that makes them both happen, or we must see if one can really make the other. If we do not do this, we will think things are true when they are not.

english_query: how to tell when what someone says gives us a good reason to believe it
ugf_response:
When a person says a thing, we all want to know if we can think it is true. We look for a sign that the thing is a good cause for us to think it true. The big thing we ask is how we can tell when a saying gives us that good cause. It is a time that makes us stop and think about what we hear and why we might hold it in our mind as true.  

One way people think about this is to look at how many other people also say the same thing. If a lot of people say it, many think that it is more probably true. Another way is to think about whether we have seen the thing with my own eyes. If we have a see of it with my own eyes, we often feel it is a stronger cause to think it true. A third way is to think about the person who said it. If that person has said true things before, we may give more weight to what they say now. The one after the third way is to see if the new thing goes with what we already know. If it goes with the other things we think are true, we may feel it is safer to add it to our group of true things.  

People give these ways for different reasons. Some people have lived in a world where many voices together have helped them stay safe, so they trust the many. Others have lived where they could see a lot with their own eyes, so they trust what they see more than what they hear. Some have learned that a person who has been right before often is right again, so they trust the word of the person. Some have learned that when a new thing does not go with the other things they think are true, it often turns out to be wrong, so they wait for more signs before they add it to their mind. All of these ideas try to give a good cause for us to think a saying is true, and each of them can help us in different times. The hard part is that we never know for sure which cause will work best, so we keep looking at many signs and trying to pick the one that feels most like a good cause for us.

english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response:
First, watch the other person. Look at what they say, how they move, and what they have done before. From that you can make a guess about what they will try next. When you have a guess, think about your own plan. Ask yourself: if the other person does the thing I guess, will my plan still work? If it does not, you can change your plan before you act.

Second, try to see if your guess might be wrong. To do that, think of another guess that is not the same. Ask yourself how your plan would work if that other guess were true. If your plan works for both guesses, you are in a safer place. If it only works for one guess, you may want to pick a plan that works for the other guess too, or you may want to wait and see more before you act.

Third, when you feel you have a good guess and a plan that works for the things the other person might do most probably, you can act. After you act, keep watching. The other person may do something you did not think of, and then you can make a new guess and a new plan. This way you keep moving forward while trying to stay one step ahead of what the other person might do.

english_query: how to think about what is fair when people start in different places
ugf_response: First, we must look at the way people start their lives. Some people start with much more than others. They may have more money, more food, or more help from their families. Other people start with very little and must work much harder just to get what they need to live. Second, we must ask what it means for things to be right for everyone. If we say that everyone must have the same thing at the end, we might not see that some people had a much harder road to get there. Third, we can look at it in a different way. We can say that things are right if we make sure that the people who start with nothing get the help they need to reach a good place. This means we do not just look at where people end up, but we look at the way they get there. The step after the third step is to think about how much help a person needs to have the same chances as someone who started with much. If the person with much has a head start, then the person with little needs more help to make the run of life right. The step after that is to say that a good way to think about this is to make sure that the starting point does not stop a person from reaching their best life. We want to make sure that the things a person is born with do not decide everything that happens to them later.

english_query: how to tell if one thing follows from another
ugf_response:
The person wants to tell how to know if one thing must happen because of another thing. The first idea is that we have a set of things that we know are true. The second idea is that we have a way of moving from those true things to a new thing. The third idea is the question of whether the new thing must be true if the first things are true.

To look at this, we first see what they say is true. They say that we start with some things that are real and not wrong. These are the things we take as our starting point. The next part is what they think follows. They think that if we use a certain way of thinking, we can find a new thing. This new thing is what comes after the first things. They believe that if the first things are true, and if the way we move between them is good, then the new thing must also be true.

Now we must see if the thinking is good. To see if the thinking is good, we must look at the way they move from the first things to the new thing. If the way they move is such that it is not possible for the first things to be true and the new thing to be not true, then the thinking is good. If there is a way for the first things to be true but the new thing to be wrong, then the thinking is not good. We must check if the path they take is strong and has no parts that can break or if it has holes that let wrong things through.

english_query: what it means for a case to be put together well
ugf_response:
When you want to make someone believe that something is true, you must build a way to show them. This way of showing is what we call a case. To make a case that is good, you must do many things well.

First, you must have things that show what you are saying is true. These things are pieces of what happened. If you say a man took a bag, you must show the bag was in his hand or show that he was in the place where the bag was. These pieces must be strong. If a piece is not strong or if it is not true, the whole thing will fall down. You cannot use pieces that might be wrong.

Second, you must put these pieces together in a way that makes sense. It is not enough to just have many pieces. You must show how one piece leads to the next piece. If you have piece number one and piece number two, you must show how they work together to show your main point. If the pieces do not fit together, the person listening will be confused. They will not see the path you are trying to show them.

Third, you must look for things that might make your case look bad. There are often other ways to look at the same pieces. If you say the man took the bag because he had no food to eat, someone else might say he took the bag because he wanted to be mean. A good case thinks about these other ways before anyone else can say them. You must show why the other ways are not true. This makes your case much harder to break.

Finally, you must make sure your case stays the same from the start to the end. You cannot say one thing at the beginning and then say something different later. If your pieces fight against each other, no one will believe you. A good case is like a house built with strong wood and stones. Every part holds the other parts up, and the whole thing stays standing even when people try to push it over.

english_query: why people sometimes pick the worse thing even when they know better
ugf_response: First, we must look at how a person thinks when they want to make a choice. We can see that the brain is like a machine that wants to save its power. Making a hard choice takes much work and much power from the brain. Because of this, the brain often looks for a way to be fast and easy. Second, we see that the brain likes things that feel good right now. A person might know that a certain thing will be good for them in a long time, but they also see a thing that feels good this very second. The brain often picks the thing that gives a quick feeling of being very happy because it is easy to do. Third, we must look at how people see things. Sometimes, the brain does not see the whole truth. The brain might only see a small part of what is happening. This makes the person think they are making a good choice, even when they are not. The brain also holds onto old ways of thinking that might not be true anymore. The step after the third thing is when we see that people are often afraid. If a person feels fear, they might not be able to think clearly. Fear makes the brain want to run or hide, which stops the brain from thinking about what is really best for the long time. Finally, we see that when many people do the same thing, a person might do it too, even if it is a bad thing. This happens because the brain thinks that if everyone else is doing it, it must be okay. This is how people end up picking the thing that is not good, even when they know the truth.

english_query: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
ugf_response:
To know what makes a person feel good for a long time, we must look at two different kinds of good feelings. The first kind of good feeling comes from things that happen to us. You might get a new thing to play with, or you might eat something that is very good to eat. These things make you smile, but the feeling goes away quickly. It is like a bright light that turns off after a short time. If you only live for these small moments, you will always be looking for the next thing to make you smile, and you will never feel full in your heart.

The second kind of good feeling is much deeper. It does not come from what you get, but from how you live and who you are. First, a person feels this deep good feeling when they have a reason to get up in the morning. This means they are doing something that feels important to them. It might be helping other people, making something beautiful, or learning something new. When a person uses their own power to do something that matters, they feel a kind of power inside. This power stays with them even when things are hard.

Second, a person feels this deep good feeling when they are part of a group of people who care for them. We are not meant to be alone. When we have people who know us and love us, it gives us a place to belong. This feeling of being known and being loved is a part of our very being. It is not a quick flash of light, but a warm sun that stays in the sky.

Third, a person feels this deep good feeling when they are able to be the person they are in their heart. Many people spend their lives trying to be what others want them to be. This makes the heart feel heavy and tired. But when a person lives in a way that is the same as what they believe is good, they find a quiet mind that does not go away.

So, the deep good feeling comes from three things. It comes from doing work that matters, being with people who love you, and being the real you. These things do not just make you smile for a moment. They build a life that feels good from the inside out, even when the world is not easy.

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who tells you a story about why they did a thing. They tell you what they did and why they say they did it. But you might think that they are not telling you everything. You might think there are other parts of the story that they are keeping inside their head. These are the hidden parts. They might be things that make them look bad or things that make them feel bad.

The hard question is how can you know what is in their head in a way that is the very same as what is real when they do not tell you? You cannot go inside their mind and see the truth. You can only listen to the words they say. This makes it hard to know if the story they tell you is the whole story or just a small part of it.

Some people might say you should look at what the person does instead of what they say. They think that if a person says one thing but does another, the thing they do is the real thing. If a person says they love someone but they act mean to that person, the mean acts tell you the real story. They look for the way a person acts to find the hidden parts.

Other people might say you should look at the world around the person. They look at the things that happened to the person before they did the thing. They think that if we know what happened in the past, we can guess what is in the head of the person now. They look for ways that things happen over and over in the same way.

Third, some people might think you can only know the truth by asking more and more questions. They think that if you keep asking, the person will at some time say something that does not fit their first story. When the story breaks, the hidden parts might come out. But this is hard because people are very good at making up stories that sound good.

english_query: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
ugf_response:
When you want to know if a thing is true or if a thing is good, you must go through a slow way of thinking. Many people try to find the answer too fast. They feel a thing in their heart and say it is true. This is not a good way to find the truth. To think well, you must take a thing and break it into many small parts. You must look at each small part one by one.

The hard question is how to make sure your mind does not make you see things that are not there. Your mind likes to take short ways. It likes to believe things that make you feel good or things that you already believe. This makes it hard to see what is actually there. If you do not take the slow way, you might believe something that is not true, or you might do something that hurts people.

Some people say the best way is to look at what happens after you do something. They think that if the end of what you do brings good things to many people, then what you did was good. They look at the end point to find the answer. They say we should make the most good for the most people. This is one way to think.

Other people say that some things are just wrong, no matter what happens at the end. They think that certain ways of doing things are always bad, even if they bring good things later. They say you must do what is right in the moment. They think that if you do a bad thing to get a good end, you have still done a bad thing.

There is also a way of thinking where you look at what you can know for sure. These people say you should only believe what you have seen or what you can show is true with what you know. They do not like to guess about things that cannot be seen. They say that if you cannot show how a thing works, you should not say it is true.

To think well, you must use all these ways. First, you break the big thing into small pieces. Second, you look at each piece and ask if it is true. Third, you look at what happens if you believe it. The way after the third thing, you look at what happens if you do it. By doing this, you do not let your fast mind lead you into a wrong way.

english_query: the problem of hurting one person to help many
ugf_response:
Person number one: I have a question about doing things that hurt people. What if we can help many people by making one person feel very bad?

Person number two: That is a hard thing to think about. Most people feel that hurting one person is wrong. But some people think that if the number of people who feel good is much larger than the number of people who feel hurt, then it is the right thing to do.

Person number one: Why would that be right? Is it not wrong to hurt someone even if it helps a big group?

Person number two: It is not a simple thing. Some people think we should look at how much good is in the whole world. If one person feels bad but ten people feel very good, they say the whole pile of good is higher.

Person number one: But what if the one person is hurt very much? What if the pain is so big that it is more than the good felt by the ten people?

Person number two: Then the way we count the good and the bad does not work. The pain would be bigger than the good. But even if the way we count shows more good, many people say we must not use a person like a thing to get what we want. They say every person has a right to be safe.

Person number one: So there is no easy answer. It is a fight between the whole pile of good and the rights of each person.

Person number two: Yes. It is a fight between the group and the one. There is no way to make everyone feel good in that situation.

english_query: how two things happening together does not mean one causes the other
ugf_response:
The first thing this person says is that two things can happen at the same time. They can move together or change together in a way that looks like they are tied. The second thing they say is that just because these two things move together, it does not mean the first thing made the second thing happen. They say that we cannot say one thing is the reason for the other just by looking at how they move.

The thing that follows from this is that we must be careful when we see things happening at once. We cannot jump to a quick thought about why things are happening. If we see two things moving together, we might think the first thing is making the second thing happen, but that might not be the truth. We must look for more to find the real reason why things change.

The way this person thinks is good. It is a way of thinking that is very good for the mind. If we always thought that things happening together meant one made the other happen, we would be wrong very often. We would see things that are not real. By being careful and not making a quick guess, we can find the true way that things work. This way of thinking helps us see the world as it really is.

english_query: the question of what we owe to people we will never meet
ugf_response: First, we think about the people who live now and the people who will live after we are gone. Second, we ask if we must care for people we do not know and will never see. Third, we look at how the things we do today can change the world for those who come later. We might make things better for them, or we might make things much worse. The thing after the third thing, we consider if a person is still a person even if they are not here right now. If they are a person, then they have needs and they can feel pain or good feelings. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we look at the way we give things to others. We might give money, or we might take care of the earth so it stays good. The thing after the thing after the thing after the third thing, we must think about what is right to do. If we only care about people we see, we might use up everything and leave nothing for those who come after. This would be a bad thing to do. The thing after the thing after the thing after the thing after the third thing, we see that we are part of a long line of people. We are here because people before us lived and worked. Because of this, we should act in a way that keeps the world good for the people who will come after us, even if we will never meet them.

english_query: the idea that we are all connected and need each other
ugf_response:
Person 1: I hear people say we all need each other. What does that mean?  
Person 2: It means that each of us is like a part of a big group and we help each other to live.  
Person 1: How can we see that we are like parts of a big group?  
Person 2: Look at how we share food, water, and care. When one is sick, others bring help.  
Person 1: But sometimes I feel alone. How does that fit?  
Person 2: Even when you feel alone, there are still people who care, even if you do not see them yet.  
Person 1: So we should try to help others?  
Person 2: Yes, when we give help we also get help back. It makes life easier for all.  
Person 1: Is there a way to make this feeling stronger?  
Person 2: You can spend time with friends, talk, share, and listen. That builds the sense that we are all together.

english_query: how a group can agree on rules that are good for everyone
ugf_response: First, we must think about what it means for a group of people to live together in a good way. We want to find a way for everyone to follow the same ways of acting so that no one gets hurt and everyone can get what they need. To do this, we first look at what each person wants and what each person needs. We see that if one person takes everything, the other people will feel bad and have a hard time. Then, we must sit down together and talk about what is right for all. We try to find a way of living where the things we do help the most people. We ask what would happen if every person did the same thing all the time. If everyone did the same thing and it made life bad for everyone, then that way of acting is not good. We look for ways of acting that make life better for the whole group. Next, we must make sure that everyone can understand these ways of acting and that everyone agrees to follow them. We try to make these ways of acting so that they are the same for everyone, no matter who they are. We also make sure that there are ways to take care of things when someone does not follow the ways we agreed upon. Finally, we find that the best ways of acting are those that we all choose together because they help us all live well and stay safe.

english_query: what it means to really know a thing and not just believe it
ugf_response: First, we look at the word believe. This is when we feel something is true in our hearts or minds, even if we do not have strong signs. It is like a guess that we hold onto. Then we look at the word know. This is not the same. To really know a thing, we need more than just a feeling. We need to see it with our eyes or hear it from someone we trust very much. We also need to be sure that the thing is actually true and not just a dream or a lie. Next, we think about why this change in meaning matters. If we only believe, we might be wrong. But if we know, we are right. This means that knowing is a stronger state of mind than believing. Finally, we see that to go from believing to knowing, we need to check the facts. We need to look at the world and see if our belief fits what is really there. When our belief fits the real world, then we can say we know the thing.

english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer
ugf_response:
The person says that sometimes the best answer is not the best choice to make. The first idea they give is that finding the very best answer takes a long time and a lot of work. The second idea is that while you are looking for that best answer, things might change or you might lose the chance to do something. The third idea is that the time and the work you use to find the best answer might be more than the small extra good thing you get from it.

From these ideas, the person says that an answer that is good enough is often the better choice. They think that if you pick an answer that is good enough, you can act quickly and save your work and your time. This way, you can use your work for other things instead of spending it all on one thing.

To see if this thinking is good, we must look at how the pieces fit together. The thinking is good if the things they say are true. If it is true that the best answer takes too much time, and if it is true that time and work are not something you have forever, then their way of thinking makes sense. However, if the thing you are doing is very important and a small thing done wrong will lead to a big hurt, then the best answer is always the only answer. The thinking is good for many things, but it might not be good for everything.

english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response: First, we must look at how people think about what is true. Many people believe that if a large group of people says something is true, then it must be true. This is a way of thinking that says the number of people who believe a thing is the same as the truth of that thing. Second, we see that this way of thinking is not always right. We can look at times in the past when almost everyone believed something that was not true. For one case, many people once believed the earth was the center of everything, but we now know that is not how things work. Third, we see that many people can all be wrong at the same time. A group of people can all have the same wrong idea because they all heard the same wrong thing or because they all fear the same thing. The thing after the third thing is that we must understand that truth does not rest on how many people believe it. The truth is what is actually happening in the world, even if no one sees it or believes it. The thing after that is that we see that we should look for the truth by looking at what we can see and what we can know for sure, rather than just looking at what other people say. This means we must use our own minds to look at the world instead of just following the crowd. Finally, we see that if we only believe what the crowd believes, we will stay stuck in wrong ideas and we will not be able to find the real truth.

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response: First, we must think about what makes a person a person. Each person is a living thing with their own mind and their own way of feeling things. This means they are not just things for us to use. Second, we think about how we want people to act toward us. Most people want to be safe and want to be able to make their own choices about their own lives. Third, we look at what happens if we do bad things to others to get what we want. If we hurt someone or take away their power to choose, we are saying that our own wants are more important than their life. This is a bad way to live because if everyone did this, no one would be safe. We would all be fighting to stay alive and no one could ever trust anyone else. After the thing number three, we see that there are certain things that are always wrong because they break the way people stay together. If we do these things, we stop being part of a group that lives together in a way where no one fights. We become like animals that only care about themselves. So, we must not do these things because it keeps us human and keeps our world a place where people can live without fear.

english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer
ugf_response: First, we must think about what it means to find the very best answer to a problem. To find the very best answer, a person must spend a lot of time looking at every possible thing that could be true. This takes much time and much work. Second, we must think about what we must give up to do this work. The time and the work used to find the best answer are things that we must pay for with our life and our time. If finding the best answer takes too long, we might run out of time to do other things that are important. Third, we look at an answer that is good enough. This is an answer that is not the best, but it is good enough to help us move forward or to stop a bad thing from happening. The thing after the third step is that we see a good enough answer can be found much faster than the best answer. Because it is fast, we save a lot of time and we do not use as much work. The thing after that is that we see the choice we must make. If the time we save by using a good enough answer is more important than the small bit of how good the answer is that we lose by not having the best answer, then the good enough answer is the better choice. This means that in many cases, being fast and being good enough is better than being slow and being the very best.

english_query: the question of what we owe to people we will never meet
ugf_response: First, we think about the things we must do for people we know. Then we see that we often feel we must help those who are near us or people we can see. Next, we think about people who are not here now or people who will be born long after we are gone. We must ask if our things and our ways of living can hurt or help these people. If we use up all the good things now, the people who come later will have nothing. If we do bad things now, the people who come later will have to live with those bad things. This means we have a thing we must do to care for people even if we will never see their faces or hear their voices. We must think about how our acts today will make the world for those who come after us. Finally, we see that being good is not just about the people we know, but about the whole line of people that will live in the world.

english_query: the problem of using what was to guess what will be
ugf_response: First, we look at the things that happened before. We see how things were. Second, we want to use these old things to guess what will happen in the time to come. This is hard because we think the world stays the same. We think that if the first thing happened before, it will happen again. Third, we must see that the world changes. New things can come and make the old ways not work. The step after the third thing is to see that we cannot know everything that is happening now. Because we do not know everything now, we cannot know what will happen later. The step after that is to see that our guess might be wrong even if the old things were true for a long time. This is because the world is not a thing that stays the same. The past can tell us some things, but it cannot tell us all things.

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more
ugf_response:
Person 1: I am stuck. I have to pick between going to the party or staying home. It feels like I can only do one or the other. What do you think?

Person 2: Do you really have to pick just one of those two things? Are there other ways you could spend your time?

Person 1: I do not know. It seems like those are the only choices. If I do not go to the party, I must stay in.

Person 2: That is not true. You could go to the party for a short time and then leave. You could also ask a friend to come over to your house. You could even go for a walk in the green place with trees.

Person 1: I never thought about those other ideas. I was so set on the two big paths that I missed the smaller ones.

Person 2: That is a bad thing people often do. When we think there are only two paths, we often pick the wrong one because we did not see the better way in the middle.

Person 1: So I should look for more ways before I decide. That makes sense.

Person 2: Yes. Always look for the third way. It is often the best one.

english_query: when one person doing something first changes what others do
ugf_response:
Imagine a group of people who are all standing in a big room. At the start, every person is doing the same thing. Maybe they are all sitting still, or maybe they are all walking in a slow way. Then, one person decides to change what they are doing. This person might start to run, or they might sit down on the ground. As soon as this person changes, the other people in the room look at them. Because they see this change, they might also change what they are doing. They might start to run too, or they might all sit down. The first person has changed the way the whole group acts.

The hard question here is about why this happens and if it is a good or bad thing. We want to know if people change because they want to be like the first person, or if they change because they think the first person knows something they do not know. We also want to know if this makes the group better or if it makes the group act in a way that is not good for them.

Some people might say that this is a good way for a group to learn. They think that if one person finds a new and better way to do something, the rest of the group can follow and do better too. In this way, the group becomes more able to think well and act well because one person was able to change. They believe that looking at what others do helps us find the best way to live and work.

Other people might say that this is a bad way for a group to act. They think that if everyone just follows the first person, then no one is thinking for themselves. If the first person does something that is not right, then everyone will do that same wrong thing. This can lead to a situation where a whole group of people does something that is not good, just because they saw one person do it first. They think that true deep knowing comes from thinking on your own, not just doing what you see others doing.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response: First, we must look at how a person thinks about the world. A person has many things they think are true inside their own head. These things form a big way of seeing everything. When a new thing comes to them, they do not see it in a way that is empty of what they already know. Instead, they look at the new thing through a way of seeing that is made by what is already in their head. Second, we see that the brain likes to keep things the same. It wants the things inside the head to fit with the new thing. If the new thing says something that goes against what the person thinks is true, the brain feels a kind of pain or bad feeling. This happens because the brain wants to stay in a place where everything makes sense together. Third, we see that if the new thing fits with what is already known, the person will think it is very good and very true. They will see it in a way that makes their old thoughts feel even stronger. The step after the third step is that if the new thing does not fit, the person might find ways to say the new thing is wrong or not real. They might look only at the parts of the new thing that do not break their old thoughts. This means that the person is not seeing the new thing as it really is, but instead they are seeing it in a way that lets them keep their old thoughts. In the end, what we think we know acts like a way of looking that hides parts of the new things we see.

english_query: why saying something over and over does not make it true
ugf_response:
We see a group of people hear a short set of words that is said many times. One person may say a short set of words and then say it again and again, and the other people hear it over and over. The scene is simple: a voice says a short set of words about something, the same short set of words is spoken many times, and many ears hear it. The hard thing to think about is why the fact that a short set of words is spoken many times does not make the words true.

First, we look at what is happening. A short set of words is a piece of talk that says something about the world. The words are repeated, so the ears get used to hearing the same sounds. The more the words are heard, the more they may feel familiar, and the more the mind may think it is safe or good to accept. This feeling comes from the way the mind works, not from the words themselves. The mind can think that something that feels familiar is more maybe right, even when the words have no thing that shows they are right or a thing that shows they do not fit with what we see.

Now we see the hard thing to think about. The question is: does hearing a short set of words many times change the words themselves? The answer is no. A short set of words is about what is or is not. The number of times it is said does not add any new thing that shows it is right or any new reason that makes the words line up with what we can see or look at. The words stay the same whether they are said once or 1000 times. The only thing that changes is how people feel about them.

People give other answers because they think about why the mind may act this way. Some say that when a short set of words is said many times, it becomes part of what we think of as normal, and we may stop looking for a thing that shows it is right. Others say that saying the words many times can make people remember them, and memory can be good for when we need to talk about something that we already know is right. Still other people say that the only real way to know if the words are right is to look at the world, to see if they fit with what we see. They say that saying the words many times does not add any new look at the world, so it does not make the words right.

Why do these other answers happen? One reason is that people feel a sense of not being hurt when they hear the same sounds many times. That feeling can make them think the words are right, even if they have not looked at a thing that shows they fit with the world. Another reason is that people may have seen the words work in one case and then think that because they were said many times, they must work in all cases. This is not right, because one case does not tell us about all cases. A third reason is that some people think that if many people say the same thing, then it must be right. The number of people who say it is not the same as a thing that shows it is right; it is just many voices.

In the end, the clear point is that the act of saying a short set of words again and again does not add any new thing that shows they are right or any new look at the world. It only adds more hearing of the same sounds. To know if the words are right, we must look at the world, see if they fit, and check them with what we see. Saying the words many times can make them feel familiar, but it does not make the words right. This is the hard thing to think about, and it is why many people still talk about it.

english_query: why a true belief for bad reasons is not the same as knowing
ugf_response: First, we think about what it means to know a thing. To know, we must believe it is true, it must be true, and we must have a good reason for our belief. Now, imagine a person who believes a thing is true. The thing is true. But the reason the person has for this belief is bad or wrong. To show this, let us look at a case. A person might look at a thing that shows the time. This thing is broken. But it happens to show the right time at that moment. The person sees the time and believes it is that time. The time is right. So the person has a true belief. However, the person does not know the time because the thing showing the time is broken. The person got the right answer by chance, not by a good way of finding out. This shows that having a true belief is not enough for knowing. We need the right reason to go with the truth. If the reason is bad, we do not really know, even if we are right. This is why a true belief for bad reasons is not the same as knowing.

english_query: why being sure about something does not make it right
ugf_response: First, we think about the feeling of being sure. This feeling happens in a person when they believe a thing is true and have no part of them that thinks it might not be true. Second, we must look at how we know things. We often know things because of what we see or what we think we see. Third, we must see that our eyes and our minds can be wrong. Sometimes our eyes see something that is not there, or our minds do something that is not the right way to think. The thing after the third thing, we must see that having a strong feeling in our hearts does not change the world outside of us. If a person feels very sure that the sun moves around the earth, that feeling is strong, but the earth still moves around the sun. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we see that being sure is a feeling inside a person, while being right is a way that a thing is in the real world. Because a feeling and the real world are two different things, the feeling cannot make the real world change. Finally, we see that a person can be very sure and be wrong at the very same time.

english_query: why following rules is not enough if you do not care about people
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who must follow a set of ways to act. These ways are written down so that everyone knows what to do. This person follows every way in the same way every time. They do not break any of the ways. They do the things that the book says they must do. To an outside eye, this person looks good. They look like a good person because they do not do anything that is not allowed.

But there is a problem. This person does not care about the people around them. They only care about the written ways. They follow the ways because they want to be right, not because they want to help. If a way says to do one thing, but doing that thing will make a person feel very bad or cause them great pain, the person will still do it. They do it because the book said so. They do not stop to think about the hurt they are making.

The hard question is this. Is it enough to just do what is allowed? If you follow every way but you have no love or care for other people, are you actually a good person?

Some people will say yes. They will say that the ways are there to keep things from becoming a state of great trouble. They will say that if everyone just follows the ways, the world will work well. To these people, the ways are the most important thing. They think that if we stop following the ways, everything will fall into pieces. They think that even if a person is cold or does not care, it is better than having no ways at all.

Other people will say no. They will say that the whole point of the ways is to help people live together in a good way. They will say that if you follow the ways but you do not care about people, you have missed the point. They think that a person who follows the ways but hurts others is not a good person at all. To them, caring for others is the most important thing, even more than the ways themselves. They think that a person must use their heart to know if what they are doing is good in the real sense.
